commands.review_summary:
This PR extracts LLM contracts, validation, event streams, registry, and stream helpers into `packages/llm-core` and `packages/llm-runtime` while keeping existing LLM, plugin SDK, and agent-core entrypoints as facades.

PR surface: Source -161, Tests +58, Config +100, Other +70. Total +67 across 50 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers: source inspection shows registry-only consumers can read `getApiProvider()` without importing `src/llm/stream.ts`, and `git merge-tree` reproduces the current-main conflict. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer review is needed because the PR has a protected label, an unmergeable head, dependency-approval gating, insufficient proof, and package/runtime blockers that should be resolved deliberately.
